summary: Completed full frontend testing of Victoria Eventos refactored app. All 8 module tabs (Resumen, Tareas, Invitados, Presupuesto, Proveedores, Notas, Galería, Archivos) load correctly. Dashboard stats panel with 6 cards working. Share modal functionality verified.
passed_tests: 6 stat cards visible: Eventos, Próximos, Tareas, Vencidas, Invitados, Presupuesto
Navigate to 'Boda García' event detail page
Resumen tab loads with client info (Información del Cliente)
Tareas tab loads with tasks grouped by month (Marzo 2026, Septiembre 2026)
Invitados tab loads with guest list interface
Presupuesto tab loads with budget interface
Proveedores tab loads with 19 predefined suppliers (Proveedores Sugeridos)
Notas tab loads with communication interface
Share button on notes opens share modal
Share modal has Copy/WhatsApp/Email options with correct Spanish text
Galería tab loads with AI image generation button (Generar con IA)
Archivos tab loads with file upload interface (Subir Archivo)
critical_code_review_comments: EventDetail.jsx successfully refactored from 1577 to ~186 lines
All modules have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full refactored app tested. All 8 module components working: OverviewModule, TasksModule, GuestsModule, BudgetModule, SuppliersModule, NotesModule, GalleryModule, FilesModule. Dashboard stats panel shows aggregate data. Tasks are grouped by month. Proveedores has 19 predefined supplier options. Share modal in Notas works with Copy/WhatsApp/Email options. All UI in Spanish.
